title: Guardrail Grind
lore: After the run — GTR-808 sampled guardrail scrape and tuned it to a warm 808 hum.
artistPersona: Drift-phonk producer — cowbell so loud the touge guardrails rattle, 808 bass tuned to tire smoke. Gym and night-drive energy only.
albumConcept: GTR-808's night-run phonk — Memphis cowbell over mountain hairpins, 808 bass thick as tire smoke.
